DEFENDANT JANET MENDOZA MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 7, 2011 PER AUGUST 29 EX PARTE ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: GORDON AIAVAO, CSR #11216 (302)
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANT JANET MENDOZA MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND HEARING SET FOR SEP-07-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-02-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JANET MENDOZA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND FOR LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MUST FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING WITHIN 3 DAYS. IN ADDITION, PLAINTIFF'S ORAL MOTION TO STRIKE FROM THE RECORD THE SOCIAL SECURITY NUMBER & BIRTHDATE IN THE ATTACHMENT (TO PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED 8/16/11) GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

calendar.matters:
Defendant Janet Mendoza Motion To Set Aside Default/Default Judgment/Leave To Defend
Off Calendar Sep-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT JANET MENDOZA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

APPEARANCES: Robert F. Cohen, Esq. (800)492-2657/(310)858-9771 for pltf & opposing party; Kevin Sullivan, Esq. 441-1052 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND FOR LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MUST FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING WITHIN 3 DAYS. In addition, plaintiff's oral motion to strike from the record the social security number & birthdate in the attachment (to plaintiff's opposition to defendant's motion to set aside default and default judgment filed 8/16/11) granted. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT JANET MENDOZA MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 7, 2011 PER AUGUST 29 EX PARTE ORDER. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR #11216
